title: Friday Sermon 10 February 1984
description:
God accepts the repentance of his votaries, provided that they truly repent from their heart, stay away from further sins and do righteous deeds. In the light of the writings of the Promised Messiah when one shows remorse on his past sins and truly repents, God forgives all his sins.

One should try to keep away from sins altogether.  If one makes the blunder of committing a sin, one must bow down before the Forgiver of sins. He is Oft-Returning with compassion and showers His servants with His mercy and grace.
